subcodes.first_line: The remembrance from the One who is Remembered be unto him who hath turned with his heart, testified with his tongue, hearkened with his ears, and arisen upon his feet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المذکور لمن اقبل بقلبه و اعترف بلسانه و سمع باذنه و قام برجله علی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @outward and inward meanings, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @goodly deeds; actions
